notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brendan Donovan.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brendan Donovan.

notableEvents.label: Austin Wells GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Wells grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop Leo Rivas. Amed Rosario out at 2nd. Austin Wells out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Amed Rosario batting, Jazz Chisholm Jr. picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Leo Rivas.
